name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.PointGunHelper.MeasureParentOffset
summary: If useIncomingTransforms = true and measureParentOffset=true then measure the Pointing-from offset from parent effector, using itms - this should point the barrel of the gun to the target.  This is added to the rightHandParentOffset. NB NOT used if rightHandParentEffector LT 0.
